PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>

SELECT DISTINCT STR(YEAR(?horrorRelease)) AS ?releaseYear
WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P31 wd:Q11424;
         wdt:P577 ?releaseDate;
         wdt:P2142 ?boxOffice;
         wdt:P272 ?studio.
  ?boxOffice wikibase:quantityAmount ?boxValue.

             wdt:P136 wd:Q43919;
             wdt:P577 ?horrorRelease.
  FILTER(STR(?horrorRelease) >= "1940-01-01" && STR(?horrorRelease) <= "1970-12-31")
} ORDER BY ?releaseYear
